zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Niernuyt於1408年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾伯納姆時，她的父親John Niernuyt26歲，母親Alice Buckhorne18歲。她於1430年與John Harvey在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Niernuyt于1408年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾伯納姆时，她的父亲John Niernuyt26岁，母亲Alice Buckhorne18岁。她于1430年与John Harvey在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Niernuyt was born in 1408, in Burnham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Niernuyt, was 26 and her mother, Alice Buckhorne, was 18. She married John Harvey in 1430, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1474, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Niernuyt est née en 1408, à Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Niernuyt, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Buckhorne, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Harvey en 1430, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1474, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Niernuyt 1408 in Burnham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Niernuyt 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Buckhorne 18. Sie hat 1430 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Harvey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1474 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Niernuyt è nata il nel 1408 nel Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Niernuyt, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Buckhorne, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Harvey nel 1430, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1474, nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Niernuytが1408年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブルンハムで生まれた時，父John Niernuytは26歳，母Alice Buckhorneは18歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでJohn Harveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Niernuyt(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 번함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Niernuyt(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Buckhorne(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 John Harvey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Niernuyt nasceu em 1408, em Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Niernuyt, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Buckhorne, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Harvey em 1430, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1474, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Niernuyt родилась в 1408 г. в местности бурнам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Niernuyt было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Buckhorne, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Harvey в 1430 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1474 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Niernuyt nació en 1408, en Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Niernuyt, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Buckhorne, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Harvey en 1430, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1474, en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
